channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Week: The Art of the MOU
Democrat and Media Lies About Pro-Life Laws Are Not Just False — They Are Deadly
item.description: They want you to think miscarriage, ectopic pregnancy, or stillbirth is the same as elective abortion of a healthy baby.

item.title: Democrats' Communist Revolution Will Destroy America If the Right Does Not Take It Seriously
item.description: A radical faction within the Democratic Party now openly rejects founding principles and the free enterprise system that built the most successful nation.

item.title: The Hormuz Strait Drone Attack and the Folly of Negotiating with Iran
item.description: 'Death to America' is not just a slogan.
